# Load the JSON files
import json, os, sys, re, unicodedata

qfile = '/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json'
hfile = '/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'

with open(qfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
with open(hfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    h = json.load(f)
len(q), len(h)[:5] if isinstance(h, list) else (len(h), type(h))

# Search for exact matches of the phrase in quranic_verses
phrase_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
matches_exact = [entry for entry in q if entry['ayah_text'] == phrase_full]
len(matches_exact), matches_exact[:5]

# search for substring "فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ" in q
substring = "فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
matches_sub = [entry for entry in q if substring in entry['ayah_text']]
len(matches_sub), matches_sub[:10]
[s for s in q if "الشُّكْر" in s['ayah_text']][:10]

import re

# Function to remove Arabic diacritics and tatweel
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""
                             [\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670\u06E0-\u06ED]
                             """, re.VERBOSE)
def remove_diacritics(s):
    return arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)

# Also remove tatweel
def remove_tatweel(s):
    return s.replace('\u0640','')

def normalize_hamza(s):
    s = s.replace('آ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    return s

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s.strip()
    s = remove_tatweel(s)
    s = remove_diacritics(s)
    s = normalize_hamza(s)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', '', s)  # keep Arabic letters and numbers and underscore? careful \w includes underscore and latin digits
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s)
    s = s.strip()
    return s

# Test
print( normalize_arabic("وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ") )
print( normalize_arabic("فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ") )

from difflib import SequenceMatcher
# Build normalized versions for q and h
for entry in q:
    entry['norm_text'] = normalize_arabic(entry['ayah_text'])
# compute for h
for entry in h:
    # hadith DB fields vary; check keys
    # we'll look for hadithTxt or Matn
    text = entry.get('hadithTxt') or entry.get('Matn') or entry.get('matn') or entry.get('text')
    entry['matn_text'] = text
    entry['norm_text'] = normalize_arabic(text) if text else ''

# normalize query
q_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
q_snippet = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"
norm_full = normalize_arabic(q_full)
norm_snip = normalize_arabic(q_snippet.replace('...','')) # Snippet with ellipsis; simplify by removing dots
norm_full, norm_snip

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    seta = ta
    setb = tb
    # compute token overlap count
    overlap = 0
    # treat tokens as list; count common occurrences? simple set intersection
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    overlap = sum(min(ca[t], cb.get(t,0)) for t in ca)
    if overlap == 0:
        return 0.0
    precision = overlap / len(tb) if len(tb)>0 else 0
    recall = overlap / len(ta) if len(ta)>0 else 0
    if precision+recall==0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return f1

def best_matches_db(db, query_norm, topn=20):
    scores=[]
    for entry in db:
        t = entry.get('norm_text','')
        if not t:
            continue
        seq = SequenceMatcher(None, query_norm, t).ratio()
        f1 = token_f1(query_norm, t)
        # combine by weighted
        combined = max(seq, f1)
        scores.append((combined, seq, f1, entry))
    scores.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return scores[:topn]

best_q = best_matches_db(q, norm_full, 30)
best_q[:10]

# search for occurrences of "لَقَدْ مَنَّ" etc
search_strs = ["لَقَدْ مَنَّ","وَلَقَدْ مَنَّ","لَقَدْ مَنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ","مَنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ"]
res = [entry for entry in q if any(s in entry['ayah_text'] for s in search_strs)]
len(res), res[:10]

[w for w in q if "وَعَدَ" in w['ayah_text']][:50], len([w for w in q if "وَعَدَ" in w['ayah_text']])
[w for w in q if "فِعْل" in w['ayah_text']][:50], len([w for w in q if "فِعْل" in w['ayah_text']])
[x for x in q if 'الشكر' in x['norm_text']][:20], len([x for x in q if 'الشكر' in x['norm_text']])
